div.ab:
in to his place and so than the pacient shall
speke.<title>For a stroke in the heed where tho-
rugh the heed is swollen.</title>Take a sou-
kyng whelpe & clene it & ley it al hoot to þe
heed of the pacient al anyght & that wol take
oute the <ref><term>bolnyng</term></ref> & swellynge & make the wounde
clere to þe leche.
